case_title: ROSSI LOUIS C IND DBA ROSSI DISTRIBUTING COMPANY VS EL OSO A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EL OSO   A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSSI LOUIS C IND DBA ROSSI DISTRIBUTING COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EL OSO   A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
